headline: Q1 Rundown: Domino's (NASDAQ:DPZ) Vs Other Traditional Fast Food Stocks
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Domino's (NASDAQ:DPZ) and the best and worst performers in the traditional fast food industry.
